reviews.review_title: Yoga app not loading any more
reviews.review_description: I have been enjoying the Yoga app for the past month but now it will not boot. It starts to load files and gets about 70% of the data loaded but then just stopes. I have reinstalled the app a couple of times but it doesn't resolve the issue. I remember that Meta auto updated my Quest 3 to OS version 2.3 March 23rd which was one or two days before I noticed the problem with the Stepmaster yoga app. Could this be part of the problem?

developer_response.body:
Dear CoralWave1599,

We are happy to inform you that we have released a new version that resolves the asset downloading issue you experienced. We have conducted thorough testing, and the app is now functioning normally.

Please update your app to the latest version and try again. If you continue to have any trouble, please reach out to us at service@metamotion.io. Thank you for your patience.

reviews.review_title: It is helpful for practising poomsae
reviews.review_description:
Adding the WT graded versions and all ITF items is excellent. The ITF training app is probably the only one of its kind, so I’m very happy to see this—especially because I like both styles.

By the way, for the past few days the app has not been able to start due to a VRKit error. It seems the app may not yet support the latest OS update.

If this continues, it means training becomes impossible, so I would really like to avoid this kind of issue.
(2026-02-15)

—-
I use it for poomsae practice and I like it.
- The instructor is shown from four directions, so it is easy to see every movement.
- The position requirements are not too strict, so it works even in a small room.
- The skeleton graphics are surprisingly good for understanding the movements.
- The price also feels reasonable (it seems to have been revised).

I also have PoseAR’s poomsae, and as software, PoseAR is much more polished.
However, its position checks are strict, and depending on the direction, the instructor can be hard to see, so it is not suitable for practising in a room.
As a result, I ended up using only STEPMASTER.

I would be even happier if the following points were improved:
- The UI (menus, etc.) is hard to understand, so I would like a clearer structure (the circular disc menu is not needed).
- Using the controller only for menu operations is annoying, so I would like to use hand gestures only.
- Please add higher-level patterns, including Koryo and above.

By the way, I also liked Tai chi. I think this approach is a good idea.

reviews.review_title: Does not work on meta quest 2
reviews.review_description: I had high hopes for he tai chi addon for this app. It failed to load on my meta quest 2. Very disappointed. Don't waste your money.

developer_response.body:
Dear paulonious,Mo

We are happy to inform you that we have released a new version that resolves the asset downloading issue you experienced. We have conducted thorough testing, and the app is now functioning normally.

Please update your app to the latest version and try again. If you continue to have any trouble, please reach out to us at service@metamotion.io. Thank you for your patience.

reviews.review_description: I downloaded the base game and purchased tai chi. It was working for a while and now I click on it the screen comes up says press any button to continue, I press a button and it goes away with nothing. I was liking the program.Ok I uninstalled the program and reinstalled, it’s working.

developer_response.body: Dear rehrlinger, we apologize for the inconvenience you have experienced. It seems like we are having a new issue due to recent update of the VR system itself. We will fix it as soon as possible. Please contact service@metamotion.io if you need any further assistance, or leave comments more in depth.

reviews.review_description:
App corrected the issue so I change 1 star to 4.
- - -
1. Beware :
A. Paying $20 for this app with basically no starting content.
B. Each content module needs further purchase. (Quality of these low resolution avatar lessons are less than similar free lessons on other exercise apps)
C. modules may contain multiple lessons, each priced ~$3, for typical $10-20 per entire module, while the whole module would likely cost $3 on other apps. Once you buy there is no refund. See below.

2. Paid $20+ for yoga but got nothing :
Purchased yoga module but it doesn’t show up as available. Another reviewer had the same issue. Meta doesn’t refund in-app module purchases . I don’t trust getting other modules . Emailed to service at metamotion dot io but no answer at all.

developer_response.body: Dear wjzhu, thank you for your review and the following update of your review! We could successfully identify and fix the problems, all thanks to you.

reviews.review_description: I thought that some tulls from itf taekwondo would be available but nothing is shown, so I can't give more than 2 stars. Do you have any idea when the app will have some itf tulls?

developer_response.body: Sorry for the inconvenience. We expect ITF contents will be available within this month. Please visit us in few weeks to see our new contents. We will also send you newsletters once ITF contents are ready!

reviews.review_description: After the update, Tai Chi is not working. Please fix this. I have already purchased a package.

developer_response.body:
Dear lin.cheng.wei, we are so sorry for the inconvenience. Were you unable to access an add-on package after purchase because of the block? If that was the problem, we fixed the bug and you may be able to access any purchased contents once you re-install the application.

Or, was there any functional problem while playing the content? If so, could you leave a comment or concern to service@metamotion.io? If you need any other type of assistance, please contact us at the email address as well.

Once again, we deeply apologize for any inconvenience you have experienced using our application.

reviews.review_description: Purchased yoga modules but can't launch these. It is greyed out in stepmaster and cannot select yoga exercises. Very disappointed.

developer_response.body:
From the bottom of our heart, we apologize for the inconvenience you have experienced. We noticed that there was an error regarding our purchase system and recently fixed the bug at this time.

Please delete and re-install the application, and you will be able to play all the add-on contents you have purchased. If you continue to experience the same problem, please email service@metamotion.io.

Again, we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this issue may have caused for our valued customers.

reviews.review_title: could be a good app if fixed
reviews.review_description: i got the freebie trial version. i was enjoying it but the tai chi sample froze up on me twice. i'll check back in a week or so and see if it has been fixed

developer_response.body:
Dear StephenDavar, we deeply apologize for the inconvenience you have experienced using our application. Our developers are reviewing the application to fix this issue as we see that there is a portion of users experiencing the crash. We will send you a newsletter to report once we successfully tackle this issue. If you have any other comments, concerns, or any ideas to further develop our application, please email us at service@metamotion.io. If you need any type of assistance, do not hesitate and contact us as well. We will figure things out for you.

Once again, we are so sorry for the frustration you might have suffered.

reviews.review_description:
First try: Tai Chi. The app offers the 24-parts Peking Form. This form needs at least 4 meters in lenght - nothing for small rooms. It is shown, but no explanations at all. Means: nothing for beginners. 

For Tae Kwon Do several trainers are offered. But if you choose a full program with one of them you are instantly prompted to pay for it, without any preview. Regardless of that they want you to pay 36 Euro for a program you've never seen.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. Our application is intended to provide a gym-like experience for our users, but it seems like there is not enough direct/indirect information provided on the interface so it caused an inconvenience for you. For Taekwondo, we released the first content (Taegeuk 1) of the first instructor as a free content, so you can play it as a preview.

We will modify the interface as well as our pricing policy. This is the first feedback we got from an actual user, and we value it a lot more than you might think. We will fix the issues you mentioned in a brief period of time. If you could, please revisit us after one or two weeks and allow us to serve you once more.

Though the pricing policy cannot be changed easily within a week or so, we will do everything else first to implement what you mentioned. I am deeply sorry for your inconvenience, and once again, thank you for your precious input!
